movie.overview: Francis, a young man, recalls in his memory the horrible experiences he and his fiancée Jane recently went through. Francis and his friend Alan visit The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari, an exhibit where the mysterious doctor shows the somnambulist Cesare, and awakens him for some moments from his death-like sleep.
movie.title: The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari

results.name: DAS CABINET DES DR. CALIGARI "Murder...help...Murder!" Clip
DAS CABINET DES DR CALIGARI "Cesare sneaks into Jane's home as she sleeps" Clip
DAS CABINET DES DR. CALIGARI "The time is short. You die at dawn!" Clip
